Starts: 1/8/2007 19:05:00
Length: 01:25:00
EIT Source: actual TS, event schedule
Name: Dead Bodies
Kelly Reilly and Andrew Scott star in this horror thriller in which a man has a row with his girlfriend only to find her dead a few hours later. Strong language. [2003, Robert Quinn] [S]

Descriptor: Content Descriptor
Content: movie/drama (general) (user 0x6/0x0)
